name: salon-durations-iterative-collection-per-service
description: Salon owner gives one service's duration at a time at SALON_SERVICE_DURATIONS — 'Facials are for 1 hour at 50 dollars'. Bot must save Facials at 60min/$50 AND stay at SALON_SERVICE_DURATIONS to ask about the rest, NOT silently default the 4 unaddressed services to 30min. Real tester from May 7 — bot defaulted Manicure/Pedicure/Haircuts/Massage immediately and the user couldn't iterate. Now uses parser's 'addressed' flag to track partial coverage; stays in state until all addressed OR user replies *default*.

turns.user: Facials are for 1 hour at 50 dollars
